message:
feat(dashboard): add status change broadcasting

Adds StatusBroadcaster for sending VM status changes to WebSocket clients.
Supports TaskStatusChanged, TaskCreated, and TaskDestroyed events.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+package dashboard
+
+import (
+	"testing"
+	"time"
+)
+
+func TestStatusBroadcaster_SendsUpdates(t *testing.T) {
+	hub := NewHub()
+	go hub.Run()
+	defer hub.Stop()
+
+	broadcaster := NewStatusBroadcaster(hub)
+
+	client := &Client{
+		hub:    hub,
+		taskID: "", // Subscribe to all
+		send:   make(chan []byte, 256),
+	}
+	hub.Register(client)
+	time.Sleep(10 * time.Millisecond)
+
+	broadcaster.TaskStatusChanged("task-1", "running", "stopped")
+
+	select {
+	case msg := <-client.send:
+		if len(msg) == 0 {
+			t.Error("expected status message")
+		}
+	case <-time.After(100 * time.Millisecond):
+		t.Error("timeout waiting for status message")
+	}
+}
